rows.notes: Consensus. Both extractors identified this clear page title correctly. Using gpt-5-mini's notes for slightly better detail on visual presentation.

Based on visual inspection, this is clearly a header row with no associated monetary amounts, as correctly identified by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly interpreted this as an entry and assigned amounts from the subsequent row.

The small mark next to '4' is too ambiguous to reliably interpret as a fraction; other fractions on the page are more distinct. gpt-5-mini (Row 2, misaligned) correctly identified the monetary values but had uncertainty about a fraction.

rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms this is a single entry with description 'go Michs'. gemini-flash (Row 4) correctly identified the amounts (181/4/0.75) and fraction '3/4', but incorrectly split this into two separate rows ('go' and 'Michs'). gpt-5-mini (Row 3/4) had errors in description and monetary values/fractions. rows.description: Mail 5. The Fine for Yarnton Rect. & Ten'.
rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms the description 'Mail 5. The Fine for Yarnton Rect. & Ten'.' (from gpt-5-mini Row 15, corrected). For amounts, gemini-flash (Row 16) correctly identified 282 shillings and 11 pence. Its note explaining the large shillings value as a ledger-keeper convention (recording total amounts in the shillings column when pounds is not present) is highly insightful and accurate. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned 282 to pounds and 11 to shillings.
